sites.name: Butser West
sites.access: Check the current club site guide and status before travel.

sites.name: Park Hill, East Meon
sites.access: Members only; Pilot rated; compulsory hill briefing and Park Hill Telegram booking. Maximum six pilots. Normally closed for shooting from about 1 September to 31 January.
sites.pilot_level: Pilot rated and confident slope landing
sites.manual_review_reason: The public site summary does not state a dependable wind sector, so Park Hill is forecast but cannot receive an automatic GO until the club sector is entered.

sites.name: Liddington
sites.access: TVHGC membership, suitable rating and insurance required. Check livestock and current site status.

sites.name: Milk Hill
sites.access: TVHGC membership and current site rules apply; check seasonal restrictions.

sites.name: Golden Ball
sites.access: Sensitive XC-only site with strict launch and landing rules. Check current club status.

sites.name: Tan Hill
sites.access: No unaccompanied flying; SSSI and current club rules apply.

sites.name: Uffington White Horse
sites.access: Experienced-pilot National Trust site; membership and current rules apply.

sites.name: Devil's Dyke
sites.access: SHGC membership or valid visitor pass, BHPA requirements and site briefing rules apply.

sites.name: Bo Peep
sites.access: SHGC membership or valid visitor pass and current site rules apply.
